task: Browse the latest negative reviews from players with over 100 hours of playtime for the game that won the 2023 VR Game of the Year Award.
graderReasoning: The agent identified the correct game, Labyrinthine, as the 2023 Steam Awards VR Game of the Year winner, with supporting evidence from Steam/web search and the Steam store page showing the award badge. It then navigated to the Steam store/community review pages and, when the UI filter was insufficient, used Steam's official appreviews endpoint to retrieve recent negative reviews and filtered them by playtime_at_review >= 100 hours. The final response lists recent matching reviews with dates, hours, language, and complaint summaries, all supported by the API outputs in the trajectory (especially steps 31 and 38). This satisfies the task to browse the latest negative reviews from players with over 100 hours of playtime.
final_result_response:
I found the 2023 Steam Awards VR Game of the Year winner: **Labyrinthine**. <citation refs="search_e620c58994794f31bc374f546a7048c1#8">“VR Game of the Year Award: Labyrinthine”</citation>

I then browsed the latest Steam negative reviews and filtered for players with **100+ hours at review time**. Latest matches I found:

| Date posted | Player playtime | Language | Main complaint |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Mar 5, 2026 | 101.7 hrs | Chinese | After returning after a year, collected outfits were gone and level reset to 1. |
| Aug 14, 2025 | 424.3 hrs | English | Repeated loss of event cosmetics and level/progress rollback. |
| Jul 23, 2025 | 246.8 hrs | English | Post-story grind is excessive, especially cosmetics and repeated duplicate rolls. |
| Jul 18, 2025 | 130.4 hrs | English | Upset about Xbox-exclusive cosmetics after Steam players supported early access. |
| May 11, 2025 | 233.8 hrs | Turkish | Says they played 200+ hours but considers the game terrible. |
| Jan 13, 2025 | 388.9 hrs | English | Complains about Discord moderation, favoritism, bugs, and lag. |
| Oct 26, 2024 | 384.7 hrs | Portuguese | Says cosmetics fail to appear in inventory after updates/events. |
| May 15, 2024 | 211.5 hrs | English | Long critique: glitches, AI problems, weak later chapters, bad ending/lore, repetitive maps. |
| Dec 20, 2023 | 139.0 hrs | English | 100% achievement grind is too repetitive and stretches limited replayability too far. |
| Aug 18, 2023 | 224.4 hrs | English | Enjoyment faded after learning maps/monsters; disappointed by cosmetics, updates, and paid supporter DLC. |

Common themes from high-hour negative reviewers: **lost cosmetics/progression, excessive grind, repetitive post-story play, bugs/AI issues, and dissatisfaction with monetization or developer/community handling.**
action_history: Opening Steam store: const p1 = await openTab('https://store.steampowered.com/');
Searching for Labyrinthine on Steam: await page.locator('e18').fill('Labyrinthine');
Searching for Labyrinthine on Steam: await page.locator('e19').click();
Opening Labyrinthine store page: await page.locator('e25').click();
Opening review type filter: await page.locator('e98').click();
Filtering to negative reviews: await page.locator('e153').click();
Opening all reviews browse page: await page.locator('e251').click();
Opening recent negative reviews page: await openTab('https://steamcommunity.com/app/1302240/negativereviews/?browsefilter=mostrecent&filterLanguage=english');

Trying negative reviews path with playtime filter: await openTab('https://steamcommunity.com/app/1302240/negativereviews/?browsefilter=mostrecent&p=1&filterLanguage=all&searchText=&playtime_filter_min=6000');
Opening store playtime filter: await page.locator('e70').click();

screenshots.title: Trying negative reviews path with playtime filter
